REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-08-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-15-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-16-2025 Continued To Sep-15-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
James M. O'Neil for April Otero, Administrator (via Zoom).

Mr. O'Neil reported that the estate includes two parcels of real property, one of which consists of multiple lots requiring a combined legal description. A longstanding purchase agreement required clarification, and the buyer had agreed to complete the necessary steps. Mr. O'Neil indicated that the process is now complete, and the inventory and appraisal can be finalized.

Mr. O'Neil stated that a petition for final distribution can be filed within three months. The Court continued the matter to September 15, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-06-2025 Continued To Jun-16-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
James O'Neil for April Otero, Administrator (via Zoom).

Mr. O'Neil reported delays due to additional information requested by the probate referee regarding a San Francisco property. Mr. O'Neil also reported that legal description errors on another property outside of San Francisco, from a prior 1992 probate matter, will require correction through a nunc pro tunc motion. This property is currently under contract for sale, further delaying the inventory and appraisal.

The court continued the status hearing to June 16, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
